name: Cream Cheese Swirled Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 package fresh bean sprouts (7 ½ ounces), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the eggs, bean sprouts, onions, crab meat, salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Mix lightly. If using canned crab meat, omit the salt.
2. Heat the oil in a frying pan until it coats the pan's surface.
3. Using about 1/4 cup of the mixture, form crab patties and fry as you would pancakes. Remove to a hot platter.
FOO YOUNG SAUCE:
1. In the same pan, combine cornstarch, sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, and chicken stock (or vegetable broth). Stir until well mixed.
2. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens.
